# SYNTHETIC clinical-note batch for project 7.3 (NOT real patient data).
# One transformer self-attention encoder block; see ../THEORY.md.
# header: V D H S B   (vocab, model dim, heads, seq len, notes)
15 8 2 8 4
# vocabulary:  tok: <id> <string>
tok: 0 [CLS]
tok: 1 [PAD]
tok: 2 patient
tok: 3 he
tok: 4 denies
tok: 5 chest
tok: 6 pain
tok: 7 fever
tok: 8 cough
tok: 9 prescribed
tok: 10 aspirin
tok: 11 and
tok: 12 history
tok: 13 of
tok: 14 diabetes
# notes:  note: <len> <id0> <id1> ...   ([PAD]=1 fills to S)
note: 8 0 2 4 5 6 3 4 7
note: 8 0 2 12 13 14 3 9 10
note: 8 0 2 8 11 7 3 4 5
note: 7 0 2 9 10 3 4 6
# embeddings: emb row = dim d, columns = all V tokens
emb: -0.875000 +0.750000 +0.250000 +0.250000 -0.750000 +0.875000 +0.375000 -0.125000 -0.625000 +1.000000 +0.500000 +0.000000 -0.500000 -1.000000 +0.625000
emb: +0.000000 -0.500000 -1.000000 -1.000000 +0.125000 -0.375000 -0.875000 +0.750000 +0.250000 -0.250000 -0.750000 +0.875000 +0.375000 -0.125000 -0.625000
emb: +0.875000 +0.375000 -0.125000 -0.125000 +1.000000 +0.500000 +0.000000 -0.500000 -1.000000 +0.625000 +0.125000 -0.375000 -0.875000 +0.750000 +0.250000
emb: -0.375000 -0.875000 +0.750000 +0.750000 -0.250000 -0.750000 +0.875000 +0.375000 -0.125000 -0.625000 +1.000000 +0.500000 +0.000000 -0.500000 -1.000000
emb: +0.500000 +0.000000 -0.500000 -0.500000 +0.625000 +0.125000 -0.375000 -0.875000 +0.750000 +0.250000 -0.250000 -0.750000 +0.875000 +0.375000 -0.125000
emb: -0.750000 +0.875000 +0.375000 +0.375000 -0.625000 +1.000000 +0.500000 +0.000000 -0.500000 -1.000000 +0.625000 +0.125000 -0.375000 -0.875000 +0.750000
emb: +0.125000 -0.375000 -0.875000 -0.875000 +0.250000 -0.250000 -0.750000 +0.875000 +0.375000 -0.125000 -0.625000 +1.000000 +0.500000 +0.000000 -0.500000

# proj: Wq/Wk/Wv are rebuilt in code from the shared integer recipe
